title: Blackbeard Speaks of Dreams
description: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Zoro, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate. Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What, you want some of this!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Like hell you are! Stop lying!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: I ain't lynin'! It's the truth!

summary: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
